name: Jenna
description:
This bot is outdated! Check out the new version here

An attempt at making Jenna from the Balto movie (a childhood movie of mine), this is probably the only public bot I'll make because I'm lazy.

The bot is set as limited so she doesn't try to you after you just waved at her or something (NSFW is obviously allowed though).

The bot's personality and first message are visible, so if you have any feedback on how I could improve the bot, please let me know and leave a review.

(Also, the bot isn't entirely accurate to the movie because 1, it's been a while since I've seen it. And 2, it's so you can basically just make your own story; Balto and Steele aren't present in this bot; so she's all yours!)

Bot pfp can be found here Jenna | sketch by ~RIZONIK~ -- Fur Affinity [dot] net

Anyways, have fun! :)
creator: SwampDeer
